历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6287→8390→12700→9908→11148, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. A significant backward shift occurred in 2023 (12700), followed by a brief recovery to 9908 in 2024, and then a further backward shift to 11148 in 2025. The cumulative backward shift over the past two years is about 1240 positions, with a baseline of approximately 11148 in 2025. The enrollment plans for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 248→247→243→232→235 respectively, and the 2026 plan is 232, a decrease of 3 compared to 2025, a slight reduction of about 1.3%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class comprehensive university. Its Soft Science main ranking has been stable at 15th–16th in recent years (15th in 2025, 16th in 2026), placing it among the top national universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving 51 incidents of academic misconduct, teacher ethics, etc. (46 negative), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 35th (relatively hot), with average short video exposure. Abnormal signals in admission cutoffs appeared in 2022–2023, particularly prominent in 2023 (12 incidents), having a lagging effect on application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including Stomatology A+, Nursing A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, etc., with outstanding strength in medicine, literature, and history, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology have high/relatively high social popularity, highly aligned with Sichuan University's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Hebei Province is about 609,800 (an increase of about 3,000 compared to 2025), with Physics Category estimated at about 365,000, slightly intensifying competition. Sichuan University is located in Sichuan Province (not local province), with an enrollment share of about 2.3%–2.4% in Hebei Province, which is a moderate level for out-of-province enrollment, with no obvious regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11148, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (235→232), the clearly negative reputation that may suppress application enthusiasm, and the slight increase in total candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift slightly backward from 11148. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11113, with a range of 10613–11613.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 10613–11613, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than 10613, you can focus on aiming for flagship majors like Stomatology and Clinical Medicine. If your ranking is close to 11613, it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
